instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: College science presentation
task.initialEmail: Hi,||It’s great that we’re going to work together on the college science presentation. [1]Do you think we should choose the rainforest as our topic?[/1]||[2]We only have two weeks to prepare, so can we start tomorrow?[/2]||[3]Where can we go to prepare the presentation?[/3] My cousins are staying at my house at the moment, so we can’t work there because it’s too noisy.||[4]We can give our presentation to the class either in the morning or the afternoon. Which would you prefer?[/4]||Let me know||Alex

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Alex,||Thanks for your email. [1]I don’t think the rainforest is the best topic, but maybe we could do the presentation about climate change instead because there’s more information online.[/1]||[2]I’m sorry, but I can’t start tomorrow because I have football practice after college. Could we meet on Wednesday afternoon instead?[/2]||[3]I think we should prepare the presentation at the library because it’s quiet there and we can use the computers too.[/3]||[4]I’d prefer to give the presentation in the morning because I’m usually less nervous earlier in the day.[/4]||See you soon,||Sam
